headline: All You Need to Know About RTX (RTX) Rating Upgrade to Buy

headline: RTX Rare Earth Sourcing Test As Missile Capacity Expands
summary: RTX's Raytheon unit is facing rare earth supply chain risks as upcoming U.S. rules restrict Chinese origin materials in weapons systems. New prohibitions are set to apply to key programs such as AMRAAM and Tomahawk missiles that rely on these materials. The Pentagon and contractors, including NYSE:RTX, are under pressure ahead of a 2027 deadline to eliminate Chinese materials from critical defense hardware. RTX, trading at $194.82, is at the center of this issue because its defense...
